context7_docs_used: @tanstack/react-query v5 — useQuery, queryKey, queryFn, staleTime, keepPreviousData→placeholderData

methodology.step_1: grep -rln supabase.from() across all src/ → 85 files
methodology.step_2: grep -rln useEffect across all src/ → 84 files
methodology.step_3: comm -12 on sorted file lists → 12 files with BOTH useEffect AND supabase.from()
methodology.step_4: For each of 12: inspect useEffect body to confirm fetch (READ) vs side-effect (WRITE/SCHEDULE/UI)
methodology.step_5: Broadened search: pages/components with supabase import + useEffect but no useQuery → 12 additional files
methodology.step_6: For each additional file: grep for actual supabase.from() vs supabase.auth → identified 6 more violations
methodology.step_7: Cross-reference each violation table against src/lib/ and src/hooks/ for TanStack Query equivalents
methodology.step_8: dev-best-practice-checker Steps 2-6 run across all src/

exemptions.reason: Cart initialization — ensureCart is a DB write side-effect, not a data read. File comment confirms: 'Retains useEffect for cart initialization'. useQuery handles all reads on line 66.
Wishlist initialization — ensureWishlist is a DB write side-effect. File comment confirms: 'Retains useEffect for wishlist initialization'. useQuery handles reads on line 46.
Operator enrichment scheduling side-effect — file comment confirms: 'useOperatorEnrichment retains scheduling side-effect via useEffect'. useQuery handles reads on lines 29 and 87.

non_violations_inspected.finding: useEffect debounces search query (setTimeout/clearTimeout). supabase.from() is inside useQuery queryFn on line 83. CLEAN.
useEffect attaches/removes click-outside event listener for dropdown menu. supabase.from() calls are inside useQuery queryFns (lines 191-3806). CLEAN.
useEffect syncs derived state: updates selectedReportId when reports array changes. supabase.from() on line 321 is inside useQuery queryFn. CLEAN.
useEffect populates form fields when modal opens (editProduct prop changes). supabase.from() on lines 186/190 are in mutation event handlers. CLEAN.
useEffect calls supabase.auth.onAuthStateChange (auth subscription — NOT supabase.from()). Correct pattern for auth state. CLEAN.

react_patterns.class_components_reason: React error boundaries MUST be class components (require componentDidCatch lifecycle). This is the correct pattern.

covered_tables_sample: cms_* tables (useCmsPages, useCmsPosts, useCmsDocs, useCmsBlocks, etc.)
uncovered_tables_in_violations: spa_menus — no useQuery hook (V-005, V-007, V-010)

recommended_migrations.tanstack_v5_pattern: useQuery({ queryKey: ['spa_menus', locationId], queryFn: async () => { const { data, error } = await supabase.from('spa_menus').select('*').eq('location_id', locationId).order('name'); if (error) throw error; return data ?? []; }, staleTime: 5 * 60 * 1000 })
Separate useQuery per table + useMutation for writes
Multiple useQuery calls — one per table

dev_best_practice_checker.supabase_safety: WARN (77 reads without error check, 49 unbounded selects)

overall_reason: 11 components use raw useEffect + supabase.from() for data reads without TanStack Query. Violates CLAUDE.md §4, CLAUDE.md §9 stop condition #13, and Launch Gate #23. No TanStack Query hook exists for any of the 11 affected tables. 8 new hooks required.
remediation_wos_needed: Create src/lib/useSpaMenus.ts — covers V-005, V-007, V-010 (3 violations with 1 hook)
Update all 11 components to consume new hooks
Verify orphaned components (SpaMenusView, MappingView, ReportsView, ServiceIntelligenceView) — no importers found; consider deletion after WO review
